◎译　　名　狂鲨风暴 / Thrash
◎上映日期　2026-04-10
◎产　　地　United States of America, Australia
◎类　　别　恐怖 / 惊悚
◎语　　言　en
◎时　　长　86分钟
◎IMDb链接  https://www.imdb.com/title/tt32362890/
◎豆瓣链接  https://movie.douban.com/subject/36893209/
◎TMDb链接  https://www.themoviedb.org/movie/1290417
◎TMDb评分  6/10 from 42 users
◎导　　演　托米·维尔科拉
◎主　　演　菲比·黛内芙
　　　　  　Whitney Peak
　　　　  　杰曼·翰苏
　　　　  　马修·纳布尔
　　　　  　Andrew Lees
　　　　  　艾莉拉·布朗
　　　　  　斯泰西;·克劳森
　　　　  　Dante Ubaldi
　　　　  　Sami Afuni
　　　　  　泰勒·科平

◎简　　介

　　在一场毁灭性的飓风中，一个沿海小镇正奋力对抗大自然的愤怒以及鲨鱼的袭击。在倾盆大雨、飞散的残骸和伸手不见五指的黑暗中，他们团结一心，勇敢面对致命的掠食者，努力在风暴中生存下来。

item.description:

📅 发布时间: Mon, 13 Apr 2026 23:59:51 +0800

⬇️ 详情: https://hdhome.org/details.php?id=288191

📄 原文内容:


                       
◎译　　名　孔雀：我是真的吗？/全职伪人(港)/客制化先生(台)/孔雀/Peacock
◎片　　名　Pfau - Bin ich echt?
◎年　　代　2024
◎产　　地　奥地利 / 德国
◎类　　型　电影
◎类　　别　剧情 / 喜剧
◎语　　言　德语 / 英语
◎上映日期　2024-08-31(威尼斯电影节) / 2025-02-20(奥地利)
◎IMDb评分　7.0/10 from 2,250 users
◎IMDb链接　https://www.imdb.com/title/tt29730305/
◎豆瓣评分　7.0/10 from 629 users
◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/35745605/
◎片　　长　102分钟
◎简　　介
　　修养不凡的文青男友、大方得体的理想儿子，甚至是练习争吵的对手，他一一为你效劳。作为专业出租伴侣，他扮演任何角色使命必达。直至女友出走，客户丈夫上门找晦气，令他精神恍惚疑神疑鬼。放下角色身份后，他发现最大挑战，是如何做回真实自己。宛如鲁宾奥士伦的荒诞设置，又似尤格蓝西莫的黑色幽默，首执导筒的伯恩哈德温格，对社会虚伪的尖刻嘲讽却自有其法，为面临存在危机的男人留一分同情与体谅。最后又能否以行动去证实他有脱伪为真的希望？

引用 Pfau - Bin ich echt? AKA Peacock 2024 1080p BluRay DD+5.1 x264-ZoroSenpai

File Name.......: Peacock.2024.1080p.BluRay.DDP5.1.x264-ZoroSenpai.mkv
Chapters........: Yes (Named)
Source(1).......: USA Oscilloscope Pictures 1080p Blu-ray AVC DTS-HD MA 5.1-UNTOUCHED (Thanks!) (Video, Audio, Commentary, Subtitles, Chapters)
Source(2).......: 1080p AMZN WEB-DL DDP2.0 H.264-BiOMA (Thanks) (Subtitles)
Source(3).......: iTunes WEB (Thanks @squash!) (Subtitle)
Encoder.........: Roronoa_Zoro@HDB, TBD, BLU

Notes...........:
▣ Source Comparison || Screenshot Comparison

▣ The USA BD has a gamma bug issue, which was fixed. The source had flat and banding-prone areas throughout the movie, so a light debanding and grain filter was added. The intro & outro credit frames had bad banding areas, so they were zoned also. The intro dirt lines were fixed too.

▣ The English (Forced) subtitle was OCR'ed & checked by me. The non-SDH full English subtitle version was created from the English SDH. The non-sdh German version was created too from the German SDH sub. The named chapter was taken from the USA BD & it was already synced to the closest I-frames.

▣ Thanks to the uploaders for the source. Greetings to everyone! Enjoy!
